# Live Product Tour: AI Suite

Webinar

# Live Product Tour: AI Suite

April 24, 2025

11 minutes

On demand

## Description

In this Live Product Tour, we show how to test and activate new user data at scale using Smart Ingest, and leverage the Predictive Goals feature of Iterable’s AI Suite.

In this session, you’ll learn how to:

*   Use Smart Ingest to quickly sync customer data from your data warehouse with no code required.
*   Leverage predictive goals to identify high-value audiences based on their likelihood to convert.
*   Use these predictions to build tailored segments and create automated cross-channel campaigns.
